title: Beatiful Keystrokes
description: Displays pressed keys (WASD, Space, Shift) and mouse buttons with live CPS counter on a fully customizable HUD.
body:
# Keystrokes

  A lightweight, fully customizable keystrokes mod that displays your pressed keys and clicks per second on the HUD. Perfect for PvP and content creators.

  ## What It Shows

  - **W A S D** — movement keys, light up when pressed
  - **Space** — jump key
  - **Shift** — sneak key (optional)
  - **LMB / RMB** — mouse buttons with live CPS inside each button
  - **CPS** — clicks per second displayed inside the mouse buttons

  ## Full Customization

  Press **,** (comma) to open settings, or use Mod Menu.

  **Elements**
  - Toggle each element on/off: WASD, Space, Shift, LMB, RMB, CPS

  **Colors (HEX ARGB)**
  - Background color
  - Background color when pressed
  - Text color
  - Text color when pressed
  - CPS number color
  - Border color
  - Live color preview next to each field

  **Layout**
  - Position X / Y
  - Key size
  - Gap between keys
  - Border on/off
  - Move with cursor — drag the whole widget with your mouse
  - Reset button — restore defaults

  ## Keybinds

  | Key | Action |
  |-----|--------|
  | **K** | Toggle Keystrokes on/off |
  | **,** | Open settings |

  All keybinds are rebindable in Controls settings.

  ## Supported Versions

  Fabric: 1.20 — 1.21.11, 26.1

  ## Requirements

  - Fabric Loader
  - Fabric API

  ## Optional

  - Mod Menu (for settings button)

  ## Client-Side Only

  No server mod needed. Works on any server.
